title: hackelia scaberrima
intro: Hackelia scaberrima, also known as Stickseed, is a perennial herb native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Hackelia scaberrima include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote healing, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, teas, and salves, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds, or taken internally to support overall health and well-being.
